title: MiiWillisCombatSound
description: This mod adds Air Combo Sound and Sword hitting Sound
body:
**MiiWillisCombatSound swaps Minecraft’s sword hit noise for two replacements: a grounded swing and a special air-combo tone that plays when you strike mid-jump. Works with every modded sword, needs zero config and is fully compatible with Better Combat, Epic Fight and any other combat mod.**

WHAT YOU DO

    INSTALL MOD
    
    JUMP + HIT = PLAYS COMBO SOUND
    
    STAND + HIT = PLAYS SWORD SOUND
    

NO CONFIGS • NO CONFLICTS • NO PERFORMANCE LOSS
MIT LICENSE – USE IN ANY PACK, MODIFY, REDISTRIBUTE

 
✅ Better Combat – FULLY SUPPORTED

❓ Epic Fight – NOT REALY FULLY SUPPORTED (some changes must be made)

✅ EVERY MODDED SWORD – AUTO-SUPPORTED

 
(1.19.2 Forge port) Soon...

(1.16.5 Forge port) Soon...

(1.21.1 Neoforge port) maybe?

![Logo of the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c594a427065b4e4aa7c2f0c7e3fce5356c3cd055_0.webp)
